name: Bunnie Rabbot - Deroboticized.
description:
Some guy wanted a Bunnie Rabbot bot, and I thought why the hell not? It could be a fun challenge to write with her accent and all that. I'm also surprised to see the lack of Bunnie bots, well, I'm glad to fill a need. But don't expect me to take requests frequently, currently it's because we have a small but dedicated fanbase.

Also possible NTR warning if you decide to romance her, she's married at this point of the comic.
creator: CharacterTalker
